title: Cam Mounting SCARA
description:
Cam Mounting SCARA

SCARA Robot

Parts list

Universal camera adapter plate: 1

Camera bracket base: 1

Camera bracket side base: 1

Hexagon socket head bolts M3 x 8: 3 Tightening torque 245 N*cm (25kgf/cm)

Hexagon socket head bolts M4 x 12: 10 Tightening torque 280 N*cm (29kgf/cm)

Installation

Install the camera adapter to the Arm #2.  (See the figure below.)
